description_long: This is a large, rectangular storage box with a robust, utilitarian design, likely intended for outdoor or garage use. The box features a slightly domed, removable lid with a subtle raised pattern and a blue accent band running around the perimeter just below the lid. Two sturdy, recessed handles are integrated into the shorter sides of the box, providing a secure grip for lifting and carrying. The body of the box is made from a durable, light gray plastic with vertical indented panels for added structural strength and visual interest. The surface appears matte and hard, suitable for withstanding rough handling and exposure to the elements. There are no visible labels, locks, or decorative elements, emphasizing its practical, functional nature.
description: A large, light gray plastic storage box with a domed removable lid, blue accent band, and recessed side handles. Its robust, utilitarian design is ideal for outdoor or garage storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plain face of the box with no visible handles or openings, highlighting the blue accent band and the domed lid.
description_view_1: Side view featuring a recessed handle integrated into the box just below the lid, with the blue accent band and lid details visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with no visible handles or openings, emphasizing the box's symmetry and clean design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the second recessed handle, mirroring the handle on view 1, with the same blue accent band and lid.
attribute_lid_type: removable flat lid with slight dome
